Describe the sequence of setup actions visible, including label reading and hose connections.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a warning label instructs reading the manual before operating; at 8s, black hoses connect to the blue machine's front panel ports; at 14s, a person wearing blue gloves connects a blue air hose to the lower fitting; at 16s, the blue lid is lifted to reveal the filter.

question: Describe the maintenance procedures shown, focusing on lid manipulation and component handling.
canonical_answer: At 14s, a person wearing blue gloves connects a thin blue hose to the machine; at 16s, the hinged blue lid is lifted to reveal a cylindrical pleated filter cartridge; at 18s, a person applies downward pressure with both hands on a white object atop the unit.
